data.name: 미지의 페이로드를 가진 휠형 휴머노이드 로봇 제어를 향한 실제-시뮬레이션 적응 기반 평형점 추정
토크 제어 휴머노이드 로봇에서의 마찰 활용
ISO/TS 15066 제약을 만족시키는 에너지 탱크 기반 제어 프레임워크
UKF 기반 관절 토크 센서가 없는 휴머노이드 로봇을 위한 센서 융합
인간-로봇 인체공학적 하중 리프팅을 위한 휴머노이드 로봇 설계 최적화
휴머노이드 로봇을 위한 모멘텀 기반 균형 제어기의 자동 이득 튜닝
Drive-WM: 자율주행을 위한 다중 시각 예측 및 세계 모델 기반 계획
휴머노이드를 위한 기하-aware 예측 안전 필터: 푸아송 안전 함수에서 CBF 제약 MPC로
물리 정보 신경망과 무향 칼만 필터를 활용한 휴로이드 로봇의 무센서 관절 토크 추정

data.description: Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting cites or references Exploiting Friction in Torque Controlled Humanoid Robots.
Automatic Gain Tuning of a Momentum Based Balancing Controller for Humanoid Robots cites or references Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting.

Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting cites or references Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Unscented Kalman Filter for Sensorless Joint Torque Estimation in Humanoid Robots.

Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Unscented Kalman Filter for Sensorless Joint Torque Estimation in Humanoid Robots cites or references Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting.
Exploiting Friction in Torque Controlled Humanoid Robots cites or references Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting.
Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting cites or references Energy Tank-based Control Framework for Satisfying the ISO/TS 15066 Constraint.

Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting cites or references Drive-WM: Driving into the Future: Multiview Visual Forecasting and Planning with World Model for Autonomous Driving.
Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting is based on or uses Active-set method.

Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting cites or references Geometry-Aware Predictive Safety Filters on Humanoids: From Poisson Safety Functions to CBF Constrained MPC.
Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting cites or references Automatic Gain Tuning of a Momentum Based Balancing Controller for Humanoid Robots.

Toward Control of Wheeled Humanoid Robots with Unknown Payloads: Equilibrium Point Estimation via Real-to-Sim Adaptation cites or references Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting.
Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting cites or references UKF-Based Sensor Fusion for Joint-Torque Sensorless Humanoid Robots.
UKF-Based Sensor Fusion for Joint-Torque Sensorless Humanoid Robots cites or references Optimization of Humanoid Robot Designs for Human-Robot Ergonomic Payload Lifting.
